cn.description:
Golden hour happens every single day. Most people miss it. Solar Arc makes sure you do not.

- Chasing golden hour for a photo? Know the exact minute it starts.
- Planning a sunrise hike? See the best trail windows at a glance.
- Wondering when the moon rises tonight? It is right there on your screen.

SolarArc is a sun and moon tracker that feels like looking out the window. Every view shifts with the real sky — warm when the light is warm, dark when the sky is dark. It is not a data app you check. It is a sky app you feel.

ARC MODE 

The sun and moon traced across your sky in real time. Watch them rise, climb, and fall against a live gradient that shifts with the actual light outside your window. View the sun alone, the moon alone, or both together.

GRADIENT MODE

Your entire day, painted in one line. Dawn amber bleeds into midday blue, then sunset orange, then deep navy night. Golden hour glows. Blue hour cools. You do not need to read a single number — just look at the color and know where you are in the day.

LUNAR TRACKING

Know when to look up. SolarArc renders tonight's moon with the correct phase shape on the arc. Plan around full moons. Catch a crescent at dusk. Know exactly how dark the sky will be.

52-WEEK FORECAST

What will golden hour look like three Saturdays from now? How much daylight will you have on that hiking trip in April? Pick any date in the next year and see the full picture — sun, moon, and light — before you commit.

FIVE WAYS TO USE THE SKY

Photography — Golden hour and blue hour, down to the minute. Stop guessing when to shoot.
Hiking — Best trail windows and how much daylight is left. Know when to turn around.
Screens — A screen curfew that follows the sun. Wind down with the sky, not against it.
Gardening — When to water, when to protect, and how many sun hours your plants get today.
Stargazing — When true darkness begins. The best window to see everything above you.

FEATURES

- Live gradient line and arc visualizations
- Sun view, moon view, or dual view
- Golden hour and blue hour timing
- Moonrise, moonset, phase, and illumination
- 52-week forecast for any date
- Five activity modes
- Medium and large home screen widgets
- Notifications for sunrise, sunset, and golden hour
- Multi-location with automatic timezone handling
- Built on NOAA solar and Meeus lunar algorithms
- Fully offline. No tracking. No account required.

WHAT IS GOLDEN HOUR?

Golden hour is the short window after sunrise and before sunset when the light turns soft, warm, and directional. Photographers chase it. Hikers love it. Solar Arc tells you exactly when it happens, wherever you are.

--

One purchase. No subscription. No ads.
Yours forever.

Questions or ideas? hello@spruzzolabs.com

答题王汇集了侦探、逻辑、数字、图形以及趣味数学、图形视觉、脑筋急转弯、趣味益智、趣味几何等益智题材。
最强脑筋急转弯，让你在答题中获得乐趣，更在潜移默化中锻炼大脑拓宽思维！
近5000道题库，详细答案解析，超级挑战益智游戏，全面提升你的智商能力，老少皆宜，让你玩不够！
让我们一同享受答题的乐趣吧。

特点：
1、题型丰富、精心挑选近5000个题目，益智娱乐首选；
2、轻松明快的界面设计，经典题型一键收藏回顾更方便；

cn.trackName: 无尽坦克大战 - 八位元单机王者 完美模拟穿越旧经典电视手游
cn.description:
经典到不能再经典的小霸王红白机坦克, 小时候发梦也在玩. 在2012年我们为了延续儿时回忆, 开发了超级坦克大战, 很多人到现在也天天玩, 除了好玩外, 因为我们提供了500张地图. 天天玩, 玩了多年也还未玩完.

由于游戏引擎老化问题, 我们很难在超级坦克大战的基础上加入新功能. 所以我们决定开发新的坦克大战, "无尽坦克大战", 延续经典回忆.

作为经典的延续无尽坦克大战, 包含了所有经典元素, 改良了的新特点.
保证你可以玩到下一个十年.

游戏重点:
- 防御你的基地
- 摧毁所有敌方坦克
- 加入超级坦克大战500张传奇地图

无尽坦克大战, 是个跨平台游戏, 你可以在不同平台上找到它的踪影.
游戏会不定期更新, 目标是1000张地图.

IMPROVED

FIXED

- Fully restored QR code detection in the camera screen.
- Fixed a bug that could repeatedly show the Subscription sheet after renewal for some users with monthly subscriptions.

hk.description:
Genius Scan 是一款可裝入口袋的掃描器。 可隨時隨地快速掃描文件，並能匯出為JPEG或多頁PDF檔案。

*** Apple App of the Week *** 2000多萬使用者 *** 1000多家小企業 ***

將任何文件放在裝置的相機前面：我們的掃描儀應用程式會自動識別背景紙張，裁剪紙張並清理結果。您可以獲得清晰易讀的掃描。批量掃描可讓您在幾秒鐘內掃描數十頁。強大的工具可幫助您組織、共享或歸檔文件。

“下一次出差時別忘了下載一個Genius Scan，可以給自己和會計部門帶來很大方便。” - AppPicker.com

“相機應用不適合對文字進行近距離掃描，但Genius Scan可以辦到。” - 衛報

==企業版== 

 Genius Scan+ Premium Pack： 

 - 開箱即用（無需升級）Genius Scan+ 的所有高級功能（用下方的 + 表示）。 

管理組態： 

 - 部署到由MDM工具管理的設備中
 - 按使用者預先配置部署應用程式設定（例如，設定預設電子郵件位址，WebDAV / FTP 憑據） 
 - 控制使用者可以將文件匯出到哪些應用程式和服務
 - 無廣告

==主要功能== 

智慧掃描： 

 - 檔案檢測和背景移除
 - 失真校正
 - 陰影去除和缺陷清理
 - 濾鏡（黑白，白板，照片） 
 - 批量掃描

 PDF建立和編輯： 

 - 文件合併和拆分
 - 多頁PDF創建
 - 照片和PDF匯入

安全和隱私： 

 - 裝置上文件處理
 + 面容_ID 
 + PDF密碼加密

文件組織： 

 - 文件標記
 - 元數據和內容搜索
 + 自訂命名方案（智慧文件名稱） 
 + 使用Genius Cloud進行備份和多裝置同步（單獨訂閱） 

匯出：

 - 電子郵件
 + Box, Dropbox, Evernote, Expensify, Google Drive, iCloud Drive, OneDrive, OneNote, FTP, SugarSync, WebDAV. 
 + 任何與WebDAV相容的服務，例如Citrix ShareFile、NextCloud，ownCloud、Synology、Yandex。 
 + 自動後台自動匯出

OCR（文本識別）：

 + 文字提取
 + 創建可搜尋的PDF
 + 掃描名片和建立連絡人

==關於我們== 

The Grizzly Labs在法國巴黎市中心開發了Genius Scan。我們製作能夠説明全世界數百萬使用者的應用程式並在品質和隱私方面保持最高標準，我們為此感到自豪。如果您有任何疑問，請通過@thegrizzlylabs聯繫我們。

==定價和法律==

您可以訂閱Genius Cloud進行備份和同步。在這種情況下，Genius Scan的商店會顯示每個訂閱的持續時間和價格，並在購買時更新。訂單確認後，將從iTunes帳戶中收取付款。除非在當前期間結束前24小時內關閉自動續訂，否則訂閱會自動續訂。管理訂閱，禁用iTunes帳戶設置中的自動續訂。

Expandable cards let you dive into the details that matter most. Includes 24-hour sparkline charts for Schumann resonance trends. Pro subscribers only.

hk.description:
"If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration."
-Nikola Tesla

KEY FEATURES:

- Monitor Earth's Schumann resonance and space weather in one app
- Customizable widgets for Home Screen, Lockscreen and Control Center
- Real-time aurora prediction with full map view
- Live Data: Real-time numerical readings for Schumann harmonics, Kp index, solar wind, and GCP with 24-hour trend charts (EarthBeat Pro)
- Advanced burst analysis and notifications (EarthBeat Pro)
- Current Reading Analysis, scientific and spiritual, with 100-250 words every three hours (EarthBeat Pro)
- Weekly Tomsk overview with sharing and archive (EarthBeat Pro)
- Share Card: Share a beautiful social card of the current EarthBeat status in dark or light theme (Pro: all supported languages)

Earth's heartbeat, the Schumann resonance, is generated by approximately 2,000 thunderstorms producing around 50 lightning strikes per second. These create electromagnetic waves circling Earth. Many observe connections between this resonance and collective human consciousness, noting behavioral changes during heightened activity.

EarthBeat tracks the Schumann resonance, visualizes space weather indices including the Kp-Index, solar wind, and X-ray flux, and integrates real-time Global Consciousness Project (GCP) data. The GCP displays as a 3D colored indicator reflecting global consciousness patterns.

Designed for iOS 17 and later, EarthBeat offers widgets in various sizes. Tomsk and Cumiana widgets show current measurements, the Full Tomsk Chart displays three-day history, and the Forecast Widget covers four frequencies. Aurora Widgets predict northern lights activity, Live Sun Images show six NASA feeds for monitoring solar flares, and the GCP Dot Widget displays consciousness patterns.

New features include Enhanced Tomsk Data with Quality Factor, Electromagnetic Background, and frequency forecasts; Complete Aurora Map View; and D-Region Absorption Prediction. Tap any graph for full-screen view with pinch-to-zoom.

EarthBeat Pro subscribers get live numerical readings with 24-hour trend charts, advanced Tomsk burst analysis (10/30/60 minutes), custom notifications, weekly Schumann overview with sharing, and 10-week archive for tracking patterns. Your subscription supports server infrastructure and ongoing development.
Compare measurements from Tomsk Space Observing System and Cumiana VLF Station while exploring Global Consciousness Project patterns. Detailed information enhances understanding of these research fields.

Now available in 9 languages including Simplified Chinese, Japanese and Russian.

If you'd like to see additional data sources or have widget ideas, please get in touch.
All displayed images are copyright-protected and belong to their respective sources indicated in the app.

You have ventured this far, now there is no turning back. Uncover the island’s dark history by travelling through crumbling caverns and mysterious laboratories, but be warned, some may not be too welcoming of your presence…

The epic conclusion to the Meridian 157 series has arrived! Follow Dr. Zander into the heart of the facility to discover the sinister purpose behind the FLARE project, and to avert the impending disaster brought on by its conception.

With the most unique puzzles of the series, Meridian 157: Chapter 3 takes you to the source of the anomaly through a thrilling journey of mind-bending enigmas, perilous exploration and unsettling secrets of the island’s previous inhabitants. Follow Dr. Zander as he is pushed to his wits-end in this final adventure.

Features:
• The final and longest chapter in the Meridian 157 storyline!
• The most unique and challenging puzzles to date
• Immersive graphics
• Custom ambient soundtrack
• A logical two tier hint system
• Available in 9 different languages
• Color blind mode

hk.description:
法医气象学家David Zander（大卫·赞德）的故事即将完结。大卫被困在一个失落而被遗忘的岛屿的地下深处，他的首要任务是从他周围的神秘事物寻找答案，并且从他所处的危机中生存下来。现在由你来寻找逃离危机重重的157子午线背后的方法，但是要注意，因为逃离可不会那么容易。大卫会找到他想要的答案吗，他的努力是徒劳的吗？

《子午线157》是一个触控式冒险系列，一系列章节种包含各种互动谜题和有趣的故事情节。本游戏使用最先进的渲染技术构建，重点在于让玩家沉浸在独特又恐怖的环境中，同时让玩家享受新奇的解谜过程。现在来尝试完全免费的章节吧，来体验《子午线157》系列提供全新感受！

特征：
•定制音乐，以及高品质的视觉体验：
•全新的产品组合功能，支持多种不同的播放风格
•最新一集更新了一段惊险刺激的故事情节
•富有挑战性和趣味性的谜题
•非常困难的谜语解谜系统
•提供8种语言，包括英语、法语、俄语、德语、中文（普通话）、西班牙语、葡萄牙语和意大利语！
•新的色盲模式适用于可能有色盲问题的人

hk.description:
在寻找神秘现象时，你发现自己被困在一个偏远寒冷，靠近北极岛屿上的一处设施中。这是什么地方？是谁建造了它？为什么遭到遗弃了？探索无人居住的复杂环境，你现在发现自己陷入困境，但要注意：可能并不只有你自己在这里…

灵感来源于经典的点击式解谜游戏，《子午线157:第一章》是这个的冒险系列的最新力作。你将扮演大卫·赞德（David Zander），作为一位气象学家，亲自去阿拉斯加海岸调查一个神秘的天气异常。在这里，你将搜索，调查并解开重重谜团，进一步深揭开第157条子午线背后的真相。

游戏特色：
• 代入式、令人印象深刻的定制配乐和音效
• 延续了惊险刺激情节
• 设计精巧的解谜内容
• 为困难谜题设计的逻辑提示系统
• 8种语言版本，包括英语、法语、俄语、德语、汉语（普通话）、西班牙语、葡萄牙语和意大利语！

透過此應用程序，您可以有效率且個人化地自動撥打您想要的號碼。您可以定義重複次數、通話間隔、新增分機號碼、撥號前啟動震動，甚至使用內建行事曆安排通話。 「自動重撥應用程式」還提供簡單直覺的介面、詳細的通話記錄和多種自訂選項，以滿足您的需求。

此應用程式非常適合需要自動重複撥打電話的任何人 - 例如預約電話、忙線重試或聯絡線路繁忙的服務。

主要特點：
- 自動重撥佔線或未接來電。
- 設定重試次數和時間間隔。
- 透過行事曆提前安排通話。
- 撥號後自動新增分機號碼。
- 每次重撥前啟用振動。
- 通話記錄和重試統計。

適合：
- 預約（醫生、大使館等）
- 客戶服務或技術支援
- 致電公共辦公室
- 自由工作者和企業主跟進客戶

無論您是打電話預約醫生、聯繫客戶服務，還是在線路繁忙時嘗試連接，此應用程式都可以節省時間和避免煩惱。

mo.description:
Golden hour happens every single day. Most people miss it. Solar Arc makes sure you do not.

- Chasing golden hour for a photo? Know the exact minute it starts.
- Planning a sunrise hike? See the best trail windows at a glance.
- Wondering when the moon rises tonight? It is right there on your screen.

SolarArc is a sun and moon tracker that feels like looking out the window. Every view shifts with the real sky — warm when the light is warm, dark when the sky is dark. It is not a data app you check. It is a sky app you feel.

ARC MODE 

The sun and moon traced across your sky in real time. Watch them rise, climb, and fall against a live gradient that shifts with the actual light outside your window. View the sun alone, the moon alone, or both together.

GRADIENT MODE

Your entire day, painted in one line. Dawn amber bleeds into midday blue, then sunset orange, then deep navy night. Golden hour glows. Blue hour cools. You do not need to read a single number — just look at the color and know where you are in the day.

LUNAR TRACKING

Know when to look up. SolarArc renders tonight's moon with the correct phase shape on the arc. Plan around full moons. Catch a crescent at dusk. Know exactly how dark the sky will be.

52-WEEK FORECAST

What will golden hour look like three Saturdays from now? How much daylight will you have on that hiking trip in April? Pick any date in the next year and see the full picture — sun, moon, and light — before you commit.

FIVE WAYS TO USE THE SKY

Photography — Golden hour and blue hour, down to the minute. Stop guessing when to shoot.
Hiking — Best trail windows and how much daylight is left. Know when to turn around.
Screens — A screen curfew that follows the sun. Wind down with the sky, not against it.
Gardening — When to water, when to protect, and how many sun hours your plants get today.
Stargazing — When true darkness begins. The best window to see everything above you.

FEATURES

- Live gradient line and arc visualizations
- Sun view, moon view, or dual view
- Golden hour and blue hour timing
- Moonrise, moonset, phase, and illumination
- 52-week forecast for any date
- Five activity modes
- Medium and large home screen widgets
- Notifications for sunrise, sunset, and golden hour
- Multi-location with automatic timezone handling
- Built on NOAA solar and Meeus lunar algorithms
- Fully offline. No tracking. No account required.

WHAT IS GOLDEN HOUR?

Golden hour is the short window after sunrise and before sunset when the light turns soft, warm, and directional. Photographers chase it. Hikers love it. Solar Arc tells you exactly when it happens, wherever you are.

--

One purchase. No subscription. No ads.
Yours forever.

Questions or ideas? hello@spruzzolabs.com

特征：
•定制音乐，以及高品质的视觉体验：
•全新的产品组合功能，支持多种不同的播放风格
•最新一集更新了一段惊险刺激的故事情节

us.description:
Golden hour happens every single day. Most people miss it. Solar Arc makes sure you do not.

- Chasing golden hour for a photo? Know the exact minute it starts.
- Planning a sunrise hike? See the best trail windows at a glance.
- Wondering when the moon rises tonight? It is right there on your screen.

SolarArc is a sun and moon tracker that feels like looking out the window. Every view shifts with the real sky — warm when the light is warm, dark when the sky is dark. It is not a data app you check. It is a sky app you feel.

ARC MODE 

The sun and moon traced across your sky in real time. Watch them rise, climb, and fall against a live gradient that shifts with the actual light outside your window. View the sun alone, the moon alone, or both together.

GRADIENT MODE

Your entire day, painted in one line. Dawn amber bleeds into midday blue, then sunset orange, then deep navy night. Golden hour glows. Blue hour cools. You do not need to read a single number — just look at the color and know where you are in the day.

LUNAR TRACKING

Know when to look up. SolarArc renders tonight's moon with the correct phase shape on the arc. Plan around full moons. Catch a crescent at dusk. Know exactly how dark the sky will be.

52-WEEK FORECAST

What will golden hour look like three Saturdays from now? How much daylight will you have on that hiking trip in April? Pick any date in the next year and see the full picture — sun, moon, and light — before you commit.

FIVE WAYS TO USE THE SKY

Photography — Golden hour and blue hour, down to the minute. Stop guessing when to shoot.
Hiking — Best trail windows and how much daylight is left. Know when to turn around.
Screens — A screen curfew that follows the sun. Wind down with the sky, not against it.
Gardening — When to water, when to protect, and how many sun hours your plants get today.
Stargazing — When true darkness begins. The best window to see everything above you.

FEATURES

- Live gradient line and arc visualizations
- Sun view, moon view, or dual view
- Golden hour and blue hour timing
- Moonrise, moonset, phase, and illumination
- 52-week forecast for any date
- Five activity modes
- Medium and large home screen widgets
- Notifications for sunrise, sunset, and golden hour
- Multi-location with automatic timezone handling
- Built on NOAA solar and Meeus lunar algorithms
- Fully offline. No tracking. No account required.

WHAT IS GOLDEN HOUR?

Golden hour is the short window after sunrise and before sunset when the light turns soft, warm, and directional. Photographers chase it. Hikers love it. Solar Arc tells you exactly when it happens, wherever you are.

--

One purchase. No subscription. No ads.
Yours forever.

Questions or ideas? hello@spruzzolabs.com

In both a figurative and literal sense, forensic meteorologist David Zander has hit rock bottom. Trapped deep underground on a lost and forgotten island, David’s priority shifts from finding answers about the mystery surrounding him, to surviving the crisis he now finds himself trapped in. Try out the fully free prologue to get a taste for what the Meridian series has to offer!

"Se quiser desvendar os segredos do universo, pense em termos de energia, frequência e vibração."
-Nikola Tesla

PRINCIPAIS FUNCIONALIDADES:

- Monitorize a ressonância Schumann da Terra e o clima espacial numa só app
- Widgets personalizáveis para Ecrã Principal, Ecrã Bloqueado e Centro de Controlo
- Previsão de aurora em tempo real com mapa completo
- Dados em direto: leituras numéricas em tempo real para harmónicos de Schumann, índice Kp, vento solar e GCP, com gráficos de tendência das últimas 24 horas (EarthBeat Pro)

- Análise da Leitura Atual, científica e espiritual, com 100-250 palavras a cada três horas (EarthBeat Pro)
- Resumo semanal de Tomsk com partilha e arquivo (EarthBeat Pro)
- Cartão de Partilha: partilhe um cartão social da situação atual do EarthBeat em tema escuro ou claro (Pro: todos os idiomas suportados)

O “batimento cardíaco” da Terra, a ressonância Schumann, é gerado por cerca de 2 000 trovoadas que produzem aproximadamente 50 relâmpagos por segundo. Estes criam ondas eletromagnéticas que circulam o planeta. Muitos observam ligações entre esta ressonância e a consciência coletiva humana, notando mudanças de comportamento durante períodos de atividade intensa.

O EarthBeat acompanha a ressonância Schumann, mostra índices de clima espacial como o índice Kp, vento solar e fluxo de raios X, e integra dados em tempo real do Global Consciousness Project (GCP). O GCP é exibido como um indicador 3D colorido que reflete padrões de consciência global.

Desenvolvido para iOS 17 e posteriores, o EarthBeat oferece widgets em vários tamanhos. Os widgets de Tomsk e Cumiana mostram as medições atuais, o Gráfico Tomsk Completo apresenta o histórico de três dias e o Widget de Previsão cobre quatro frequências. Os Widgets de Aurora preveem a atividade das luzes do norte, as Imagens Solares em Direto mostram seis feeds da NASA para vigiar erupções solares e o Widget Ponto GCP exibe padrões de consciência.

As novidades incluem Dados Tomsk Melhorados com Fator de Qualidade, Fundo Eletromagnético e previsões de frequência; Vista Completa do Mapa de Aurora; e Previsão de Absorção na Região D. Toque em qualquer gráfico para vê-lo em ecrã inteiro com zoom por gesto de pinça.

Os subscritores do EarthBeat Pro recebem leituras numéricas em direto com gráficos de tendência de 24 horas, análise avançada de “bursts” de Tomsk (10/30/60 minutos), notificações personalizadas, resumo semanal da Schumann com partilha e arquivo de 10 semanas para acompanhar padrões. A sua subscrição apoia a infraestrutura de servidores e o desenvolvimento contínuo.

Compare medições do Tomsk Space Observing System e da Cumiana VLF Station enquanto explora os padrões do Global Consciousness Project. Informação detalhada aprofunda a compreensão destas áreas de investigação.

Pode definir o número de repetições, o intervalo entre chamadas, adicionar um posto, ativar a vibração antes de marcar e até mesmo agendar as suas chamadas utilizando um calendário integrado. A Auto Redial App oferece ainda uma interface simples e intuitiva, um histórico de chamadas detalhado e várias opções de personalização para se adequar às suas necessidades.

Tank Battle is very popular TV game since 8-bit console present. From 2012, we develop "Super Tank Battle" and provide 500 maps to player. Many people play it day by day.

Now we using a new game engine to offer new game "Infinity Tank Battle".

Infinity Tank Battle is a brand new tank battle game. It is following various classic essential features, and add some new interesting elements.

Core Game Rule:
- Defence your base
- Destroy all enemy tanks

Key Features:
- Different type of enemy
- Different type of Map style
- Special items
- Auto Helper tank
- Import Super Tank Battle 500 Legend maps

Infinity Tank Battle will continue update, our target is over 1000 map. And this game is cross-platform, you can find it on mobile, PC, and Mac.
